title: About Peninsula Youth Theatre
story:
For more than three decades, Peninsula Youth Theatre has been the Bay Area's home for transformative theatre education and family-friendly performance.

Founded in 1989 as a small after-school program, PYT has grown into a year-round community of more than 10,000 young performers, families, educators, and supporters. We produce three full-scale Mainstage shows every year at Mountain View Center for the Performing Arts; we run classes and camps that introduce children as young as four to the joy of theatre; we tour Stories on Stage to schools across Silicon Valley; and we maintain one of the region's largest theatrical rental inventories.

What unites all of it is a simple belief: every child deserves a stage. Our scholarship fund makes sure no family is turned away for reasons of cost, and our ensemble-focused approach means every performer — whether they have one line or one hundred — gets a meaningful experience on stage.

We are a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. Your support — through tickets, donations, and time — is what keeps the curtain rising.
address: 2500 Old Middlefield Way, Mountain View, CA 94043
